data.text/markdown: Single Qubit System State of the one-qubit system can be represented in form of the equation using only two degrees of freedom ||(\theta||) and ||(\phi||): ||[ \ket q = \mathrm{cos} ( \frac{\theta}{2})\ket 0 + \mathrm{sin}(\frac{\theta}{2}) e^{i\phi}\ket 1 ||]In the below cells you can use sliders to try different values of ||(\theta||) and ||(\phi||). Check how the visualisation of the state changes on the Bloch sphere.
